C:\PROGRA~2\GNUARM~1\102021~1.10\bin\AR19DD~1.EXE -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wall -O0 -g3 -DSTM32F411xE -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard     -T"C:/Users/musta/OneDrive/Desktop/Embedded C/Embedded C/STM32F411RETX_FLASH.ld"     -Wl,--gc-sections     -Wl,-Map=output.map     --specs=nano.specs     --specs=nosys.specs CMakeFiles/stm32_drivers.elf.dir/src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/stm32_drivers.elf.dir/startup/startup_stm32f411retx.s.obj -o stm32_drivers.elf
